　　Popeye and Olive are taking in a variety show. Popeye enjoys the juggling seal very much, but he's followed by magician/hypnotist Bluto. Next, he hypnotizes Olive, but while she's walking toward Bluto in a trance, Popeye points her the other way and goes aft...
